scope_reduction.reason: prompt's a2 range [-floor(b1^2/2), floor(b1^2/2)] combined with b1 in {-12..-8, 8..12} and free range {-5..5} gives 1,352,296 families, exceeding the 500,000 halt threshold from copilot-instructions.md.
scope_reduction.implication_for_results: the conjecture-defining ratio -2/9 IS reachable in this scope at (a2,b1)=(-18,9) and (-32,12), but the original 24 Trans hits at b1=+/-3 used (a1,a0,b0) shapes potentially outside {-3..3}^3. Absence of Trans at the -2/9 ratio for these b1 may be due to free-coeff restriction rather than absence of Trans-stratum membership.
